ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image (file name) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "is_male" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subject is male (1) or not (-1) */,
  "left_eye_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the left eye */,
  "left_eye_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the left eye */,
  "right_eye_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the right eye */,
  "right_eye_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the right eye */,
  "nose_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the nose */,
  "nose_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the nose */,
  "mouth_left_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the left corner of the mouth */,
  "mouth_left_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the left corner of the mouth */,
  "mouth_right_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the right corner of the mouth */,
  "mouth_right_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the right corner of the mouth */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the subject */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "glasses" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subject is wearing glasses (1) or not (-1) */,
  "beard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subject has a beard (1) or not (-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facial_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facial feature */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* Reference to the image the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of facial feature (e.g., left_eye, right_eye, nose, mouth_left, mouth_right) */,
  "x_coordinate" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the facial feature */,
  "y_coordinate" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the facial feature */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the facial feature detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facial_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* Reference to the image the metadata belongs to */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was captured */,
  "capture_device" TEXT /* Device used to capture the image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "resolution_width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "resolution_height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "camera_settings" TEXT /* Camera settings used to capture the image */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions during image capture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facial feature analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., emotion detection, age estimation) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_analysis_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES facial_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_analysis_analysis_type FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_type") REFERENCES models ("model_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's capabilities */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being trained */,
  "training_start" TEXT /* Start date of the training session */,
  "training_end" TEXT /* End date of the training session */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* Dataset used for training */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the trained model */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken for training */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Evaluation metrics of the trained model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., facial emotion, age estimation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric (e.g., F1-score, mean absolute error) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
